note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 source, not captured. Pins the ONE-SHOT `{{original}}` macro inside a character-card post_history override: the FIRST `{{original}}` expands to the preset jailbreak text the override replaced (openai.js:1489-1492 → substituteParams `{ original }`), every LATER `{{original}}` in the same string expands to '' (MacroEnvBuilder.js:144-151). Distinct from wp-2.3-macro-unknown-literal (unknown → literal): here the macro is KNOWN and dynamic, and its second use is deliberately empty. Adapter-reproduced (promptBuilder.ts:781/1040 threads originalContent into macroPass; macros.ts:47-52). Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled.

input.description: Card post_history override uses {{original}} twice; first yields the replaced preset jailbreak text, second yields empty.

character.name: Wen
character.description: Character brindle: Wen, a tidewatcher of the Sallow coast.

mustContain: CARD-JB opener [PRESET-JB: uphold the concord verbatim.] and again [] closer.
